translations.en: Beh Lem
translations.note: NPC name — Gargish, 'just one'，音譯為貝蘭

translations.en: a small, light-skinned gargoyle.
"To ask how I can help, mighty $P," Beh Lem asks.
translations.zh: 「願問強大之$P，我能如何效勞？」貝蘭問道。
translations.note: 魔像語法：以「To+動詞」開頭，譯為文言

translations.en: The gargoyle greets you enthusiastically, but you can't understand him!
translations.zh: 魔像熱情地與你打招呼，你卻完全聽不懂！

translations.en: Seeing your confusion, he switches to the human language. It's obviously a strain for him.
translations.zh: 見你一臉困惑，他切換成人類語言。這對他顯然費勁。

translations.en: "Hello. I little human @speak."
translations.note: 破碎的人類語，保留原味

translations.en: $Y speaks. "$P, let's away from here."
"There's naught of use this creature can tell us. Agreed?"
translations.zh: 「這生靈對我們毫無用處。同意嗎？」

translations.en: The confused gargoyle waves good-bye.
"As you wish, $G."
"Captain John friend. He come here. I wait here."
translations.zh: 「約翰船長朋友。他來這。我等這。」

translations.en: "No name. I Beh Lem."
"I wait here. @Captain John come."
"@Captain John teach I human speak," the gargoyle says haltingly.
translations.zh: 「@Captain約翰船長教我人類說話，」魔像吞吞吐吐地說。

translations.en: The confused gargoyle waves good-bye.
The gargoyle shrugs.
"To greet you, human. To recognize you as the False @Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「見人類而作禮。認汝乃偽@Prophet先知！」

translations.en: "Good $T, my friend
. To have met @Valkadesh yet?"
"To know Captain John! To help him and @Valkedesh in their work," the youngster says proudly.
translations.zh: 「識得約翰船長！助他與@Valkedesh共事，」這小傢伙自豪地說。

translations.en: "To not receive a true name until I have proved myself @worthy."
"To be called Beh Lem, which means 'just one.' To have not yet received a @true name."
translations.zh: 「吾被稱作貝蘭，意為『僅此一人』。尚未獲賜@true真名。」

translations.en: "To not deserve a name yet. But to get one someday, just like my father @Valkadesh!"
translations.zh: 「尚不配得真名。然終將得之，如吾父@Valkadesh一般！」

translations.en: "To be here to help you, noble $P."
"To be here to wait for Captain @John."
"To very much respect Valkadesh my father."
"To want to be a scholar someday just like him!"
translations.zh: 「願他日成一學者，如吾父一般！」

translations.en: "To ask what directions were unclear?"
"To not know much about that. But to be sure that @Valkadesh would know!"
"To be one of our guiding @principles."
"To be surprised that you don't know that!"
"To have three guiding principles - @control, @diligence, and @passion."
translations.zh: 「吾族有三大指引原則——@control克制、@diligence勤勉、@passion熱情。」

translations.en: "To be the basis of all gargoyle beliefs."
"To be feared by everybody - everybody except me and @Valkadesh, my father!"
translations.zh: 「人人皆懼之——除吾與吾父@Valkadesh之外！」

translations.en: "To wish to stay with you!"
"To not leave until there is peace between our races!"
"May
our persistence and precision lead to success!"
translations.zh: 以恆毅與精準引領吾等走向勝利！」

translations.en: During your absence, $9 decided to head for the surface, to inform Lord British of your progress.
translations.zh: 你離開期間，$9決定前往地面，向不列顛王稟報進度。

translations.en: "To be in danger from the lava! To stay far away!"
"To walk clockwise around the mountains from Hythloth to reach my father's @house."
translations.zh: 「自海帝羅斯出發，順時針繞山而行，可至吾父之@house居所。」

translations.en: "To find the house of Valkadesh my father through the pass east of the @Hall."
translations.zh: 「穿過@Hall智識之殿以東的山口，可尋得吾父瓦卡德許之居所。」

translations.en: "To find the Hall of Knowledge to the south of the city."
"To avoid the Hall! To talk to @Valkadesh first!"
"Good! To know that he very much wanted to speak with you."
"To wish to meet Valkadesh?"
"To go with you and @guide you there!"
"Oh." The little gargoyle seems saddened.
"To wish @directions to the house of Valkadesh?"
translations.zh: 「需要前往瓦卡德許居所的@directions指引嗎？」

translations.en: "Then to not understand you."
"To go from the entrance to Hythloth westward, following the @mountains."
translations.zh: 「自海帝羅斯入口向西，沿@mountains山脈而行。」

translations.en: "Then to turn north, at the @Hall of Knowledge."
"To walk east along the mountains until you come to a narrow pass."
"To find the @house of Valkadesh through the pass!"
translations.zh: 「穿越山道，即可尋得瓦卡德許之@house居所！」

translations.en: "To see it at 40 degrees south, 65 degrees east by the sextant."
translations.zh: 「以六分儀測量，位於南緯40度、東經65度。」

translations.en: "But to take care! To avoid the @lava pits and the @Hall of Knowledge!"
translations.zh: 「但須小心！避開@lava岩漿坑與@Hall智識之殿！」

translations.en: "To understand these @directions?"
"Good!"
"To ask what was unclear?"
The little gargoyle eagerly joins your group.
translations.zh: 小魔像迫不及待地加入你的隊伍。

translations.en: "To wish very much to join you. But to not have enough room in your party for another."
translations.zh: 「甚願加入，然汝之隊伍已無多餘位置。」

translations.en: $9 speaks. "$G, I'll return to the surface and let everyone know of our progress."
translations.zh: $9說：「$G，吾將返回地面，向大家稟報我們的進度。」

translations.en: "To not be able to join you right now. To ask again later, perhaps."
translations.zh: 「眼下無法與汝同行。也許稍後再問。」

translations.en: The little gargoyle eagerly joins your group.
translations.zh: 小魔像迫不及待地加入你的隊伍。

translations.en: "To know nothing about that."
"To be young. To think you should ask someone older."
"To truly wish I could help you with that."
"To not understand what you mean by $Z."
"To not have enough experience to answer that."

translator_notes: 貝蘭為年輕魔像，習得破碎人類語（早期對話）及魔像典雅語法（後期）。前段人類語保留破碎口語感；後段魔像語用文言「To+動詞」對應為文言句式。道別語「願以恆毅與精準引領吾等走向勝利」保留魔像三原則意象。
